title: sync-targets.yaml schema (skills)
description: Schema for sync-targets.yaml that drives the push-based /sync-consumers skill. See issue #80 / sub-issue #81 / plan structured-nibbling-harbor.md. The commons-side variant (source: commons) lives in the commons repo.

version.description: Schema version. Bumped on breaking change.

owner.description: GitHub org that owns the target repos. Currently fixed to ozzy-labs.

source.description: Source repo identifier. The skills-side file MUST declare 'skills'.

defaults.description: Default per-target policy. Each target entry can override these.

branch_prefix.description: Branch name prefix for the sync PR (final form: <prefix>-<short-sha>).

base_branch.description: Base branch to checkout when cloning the consumer.

auto_merge.description: If true, attempt `gh pr merge --auto --squash` on the sync PR.

merge_method.description: Merge strategy used when auto_merge is true.

reuse_open_pr.description: If true, force-update an existing open PR instead of closing and recreating it.

tolerate_existing_branch.description: If false, a pre-existing remote branch with the same name aborts the sync (treated as a signal that a previous run was interrupted).

targets.description: List of consumer repo targets. NOTE: uniqueItems catches identical entries via deep equality. Duplicate `repo` values with different overrides (e.g. same repo, different note) cannot be expressed in standard JSON Schema and MUST be enforced by the loader/skill at runtime.

repo.description: <owner>/<repo>. Owner scope is locked to ozzy-labs.

disabled.description: If true, this target is skipped and a warning is reported.

disabled_reason.description: Human-readable reason why this target is disabled. Required (non-empty) when disabled is true.

note.description: Free-form context surfaced in the sync PR description.
